title: Timeline Page Gets New Line Chart Feature

topics.title: Pull Requests and Merges
topics.summary: Recent pull requests include a fix for resolving injustice and the addition of a timeline chart. The chart enhances user interaction by allowing toggles for install size and dependencies, and it features a sticky design for better usability. Both PRs contribute to the overall functionality of npmx.

topics.title: Issue Tracking and Resolution
topics.summary: The closure of Issue #2658 marks the successful addition of a line chart to the timeline page, fulfilling requirements for visualizing total size and dependency count. This enhancement reflects user interactions and improves data representation, showcasing the team's commitment to addressing user needs.

topics.title: Community Engagement
topics.summary: Engagement on Bluesky includes a post expressing excitement about recent developments and a repost highlighting the growth of the MSW library. The latter emphasizes community contributions and the impact of advocacy on library adoption, showcasing the vibrant ecosystem surrounding JavaScript tools.
